records.question: 查一下目前有多少注册用户
agent_sqls: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS user_count FROM users GROUP BY status ORDER BY user_count DESC;

records.question: 查一下总订单数
agent_sqls: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY status ORDER BY order_count DESC;

records.question: 平台上一共发过多少帖子
agent_sqls: SELECT content_type, COUNT(*) AS post_count FROM posts GROUP BY content_type ORDER BY post_count DESC;

records.question: 目前有多少营销活动
agent_sqls: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS campaign_count FROM campaigns GROUP BY status ORDER BY campaign_count DESC;

records.question: 最新一天的 DAU 是多少
records.detail: 命中 golden[events last day distinct users]≈27.0

records.question: 正在进行的 A/B 测试有哪些
agent_sqls:
SELECT test_id, test_name, primary_metric, traffic_percentage, start_date::date AS start_date, owner
FROM ab_tests
WHERE status = 'running'
ORDER BY start_date DESC;

records.question: 有哪些获客渠道
用户的性别分布是怎样的？男女各多少人？
agent_sqls:
SELECT
    gender,
    COUNT(*) AS user_count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 2) AS pct
FROM user_profiles
GROUP BY gender
ORDER BY user_count DESC;
records.detail: 命中 golden[group by gender] 键2/2

records.question: 用户使用的设备类型分布，iOS 和 Android 各占多少设备
agent_sqls:
SELECT
    device_type,
    COUNT(*) AS device_count,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 2) AS percentage
FROM user_devices
GROUP BY device_type
ORDER BY device_count DESC;

records.question: 各订单状态的数量分布
agent_sqls:
SELECT
    status,
    COUNT(*) AS order_count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 2) AS pct
FROM orders
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY order_count DESC;
records.detail: 命中 golden[group by status] 键6/6

records.question: 最近7天访问量最高的页面 Top 10
agent_sqls:
SELECT
    page_name,
    COUNT(*) AS pv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS uv,
    ROUND(AVG(duration_seconds)) AS avg_duration
FROM page_views
WHERE view_time >= (SELECT max(view_time)::date FROM page_views) - INTERVAL '6 days'
GROUP BY page_name
ORDER BY pv DESC
LIMIT 10;

records.question: 点赞数最多的帖子 Top 5

goldens.label: join post_likes
rows: 入手商品121一个月，说说感受

goldens.label: denormalized like_count
rows: 新手必看！简介选购指南

agent_sqls:
SELECT post_id, title, content_type, like_count, view_count, comment_count, share_count
FROM posts
WHERE status = 'published'
ORDER BY like_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT pl.post_id, p.title, p.content_type, COUNT(*) AS likes
FROM post_likes pl
JOIN posts p ON p.post_id = pl.post_id
GROUP BY pl.post_id, p.title, p.content_type
ORDER BY likes DESC
LIMIT 5;

records.question: 优惠券的使用率是多少
agent_sqls:
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_received,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN status='used' THEN 1 END) AS used_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN status='unused' THEN 1 END) AS unused_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN status='expired' THEN 1 END) AS expired_count,
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN status='used' THEN 1 END)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),2) AS usage_rate
FROM user_coupons;

records.question: 过去30天的 GMV 是多少
agent_sqls: SELECT dt, gmv FROM mart_daily_kpi WHERE dt > ((SELECT max(dt) FROM mart_daily_kpi) - interval '30 day') ORDER BY dt

records.question: GMV 最高的商品 Top 10，显示商品名称和销售额

goldens.label: order_items joined valid orders
rows: 经典宜家 床上用品
精选科沃斯 消毒柜

agent_sqls:
SELECT oi.product_name,
       SUM(oi.actual_amount) AS gmv
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.status IN ('paid','shipped','delivered')
GROUP BY oi.product_name
ORDER BY gmv DESC
LIMIT 10;
records.detail: 命中 golden[order_items joined valid orders] 10/10

records.question: 过去30天没有任何会话活动的用户有多少（流失用户）
agent_sqls:
WITH anchor AS (
  SELECT max(start_time)::date AS max_dt FROM sessions
),
active_recent AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT user_id
  FROM sessions, anchor
  WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL
    AND start_time >= anchor.max_dt - interval '29 days'
)
SELECT
  (SELECT count(*) FROM users) AS total_users,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM active_recent) AS active_users_30d,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM users) - (SELECT count(*) FROM active_recent) AS churned_users,
  ROUND(((SELECT count(*) FROM users) - (SELECT count(*) FROM active_recent)) * 100.0 / (SELECT count(*) FROM users), 1) AS churn_rate_pct,
  (SELECT max_dt FROM anchor) AS anchor_date
FROM anchor;

records.question: 使用了优惠券的订单和未使用优惠券的订单，客单价对比
agent_sqls:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN coupon_id IS NOT NULL THEN '使用优惠券' ELSE '未使用优惠券' END AS grp,
  COUNT(*) AS valid_orders,
  ROUND(AVG(actual_amount), 2) AS avg_order_value,
  ROUND(SUM(actual_amount), 2) AS revenue
FROM orders
WHERE status IN ('paid','shipped','delivered')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;
records.detail: 命中 golden[valid status] 两值均匹配

records.question: 从浏览商品 → 加入购物车 → 开始结算 → 支付成功的转化漏斗，各步骤的独立用户数
agent_sqls:
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_name = 'product_view' THEN user_id END) AS viewed,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_name = 'add_to_cart' THEN user_id END) AS added_cart,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_name = 'checkout' THEN user_id END) AS checkout,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_name = 'purchase' THEN user_id END) AS purchased
FROM events
WHERE event_name IN ('product_view','add_to_cart','checkout','purchase');

SELECT event_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS uu
FROM events
GROUP BY event_name
ORDER BY cnt DESC;

SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_name = 'view_product' THEN user_id END) AS viewed,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_name = 'add_to_cart' THEN user_id END) AS added_cart,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_name = 'begin_checkout' THEN user_id END) AS checkout,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_name = 'purchase' THEN user_id END) AS purchased
FROM events
WHERE event_name IN ('view_product','add_to_cart','begin_checkout','purchase');
records.detail: 命中 golden[all-time distinct users] 4/4 步

records.question: 各获客渠道的用户 ARPU（人均消费）对比，给出最高的3个渠道
agent_sqls:
SELECT register_channel,
       count(*) AS users,
       count(*) FILTER (WHERE first_paid_date IS NOT NULL) AS buyers,
       round(sum(total_gmv),0) AS gmv,
       round(sum(total_gmv)/nullif(count(*),0),0) AS arpu_all,
       round(avg(total_gmv) FILTER (WHERE first_paid_date IS NOT NULL),0) AS arppu_buyer
FROM mart_user_summary
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY arpu_all DESC;

records.question: 用户的 30 天复购率是多少
最近7天的 GMV 和再往前7天相比是涨是跌？涨跌多少？
agent_sqls:
WITH a AS (SELECT max(dt) AS m FROM mart_daily_kpi)
SELECT
  sum(gmv) FILTER (WHERE dt > (SELECT m FROM a) - interval '7 day') AS gmv_last7,
  sum(gmv) FILTER (WHERE dt > (SELECT m FROM a) - interval '14 day' AND dt <= (SELECT m FROM a) - interval '7 day') AS gmv_prev7,
  (SELECT m FROM a) AS anchor
FROM mart_daily_kpi;

WITH a AS (SELECT max(dt) AS m FROM mart_daily_kpi)
SELECT dt, gmv,
  CASE WHEN dt > (SELECT m FROM a) - interval '7 day' THEN '近7天' ELSE '前7天' END AS period
FROM mart_daily_kpi
WHERE dt > (SELECT m FROM a) - interval '14 day'
ORDER BY dt;
records.detail: 命中 golden[mart_daily_kpi wow] 两值均匹配
